dialogueChunks.intro: The person behind {quest_focus_the} refuses to believe they've done wrong. {quest_threat_The} runs deep: they see every attempt to intervene as an attack on the people they're trying to protect.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} has rallied supporters near {location_hint} who share their conviction. Meanwhile, the {enemy_type_plural} are exploiting the distraction to push deeper into our territory. {quest_ally} says {quest_stakes_the} grow more fragile with each day of deadlock.
dialogueChunks.outro: Prove that the real danger isn't what they fear but what they've become. Clear the {enemy_type_plural} threat near {location_hint} and show that protection doesn't require tyranny.

dialogueChunks.intro: The consequences of {quest_focus_the} keep spreading. People who trusted {target_npc} are now stranded, hurt, or missing because of decisions made out of devotion rather than sense.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} found supplies scattered near {location_hint}, abandoned when {quest_threat_the} displaced people from their routes. The {enemy_type_plural} have been picking over what was left. {quest_stakes_The} need immediate material support while we sort out the larger problem.
dialogueChunks.outro: Recover what was lost and secure the area. Every piece of {quest_item} you bring back is one less person going without.

dialogueChunks.intro: The situation around {quest_focus_the} has reached a crisis. The person responsible has realized the harm they've caused and is devastated: but the damage still needs repair.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is consumed with guilt. {quest_ally} is trying to hold the community together while the {enemy_type_plural} near {location_hint} probe our weakened defenses. {quest_threat_The} created vulnerabilities everywhere, and {quest_stakes_the} need someone to plug the gaps.
dialogueChunks.outro: The emotional fallout will take time. Right now we need the practical problems solved. Get out there and shore up what {quest_threat_the} left exposed.
